header.description: A compact view of your cash flow, spending patterns, and transactions.

empty.title: No data yet
empty.description: Import a Revolut CSV file to see your financial overview.

charts.cashFlowDescription: Income and expenses over time with net movement.
charts.spendingByCategoryDescription: Where most of your money is going.

insights.title: Financial Insights
insights.description: Fast signals to understand spending behavior at a glance.

table.title: Transactions
table.descriptionLong: Search, categorize, and inspect the transactions behind your numbers.
table.noTransactions: No transactions match the current filters.

sidebar.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently remove all transactions from this import.

packages.title: Category Packages
packages.description: Create reusable category systems. Packages are independent from imports.
packages.selectPackageHint: Select a package from the sidebar or create a new one to start configuring categories.
packages.deletePackageConfirm: Delete this package? Categories, rules, and assignments for this package will be removed. Imports will remain.
packages.noCategoriesHint: Create your first category to start organizing transactions.
packages.newCategoryDescription: Add a category to the current package.
packages.editCategoryDescription: Update the name, icon, or color.
packages.deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete this category permanently? Transactions using it will become Uncategorized.
packages.rulesDescription: Rules are created only when you explicitly save one from a categorized transaction.
packages.noRules: No rules have been created for this package.
packages.createRuleDescription: Apply this category automatically when {matchType} matches “{matchValue}”?
